title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
Fed Warsh testifies to House (today) & Senate (tomorrow) — first H-H appearance; FOMC dot plot shifted to hike bias (median 3.8% year-end)
BTC -3.46% (24h) → $61,893; double-top cap ~$62,550; June CPI due 13:30 UTC is the key near-term catalyst
Oil +3.5% (24h) → Brent $78.73; US-Iran hostilities keeping energy bid elevated
Q2 bank earnings (JPM, GS, BAC, WFC, C) pre-market today alongside CPI — options pricing 4–6% moves in banks
